title: Littlebird pricing
ocrText: Littlebird — Pricing. Basic Free. Plus $17/mo (billed annually $204). Pro from $100/mo. Team from $17/mo per seat. Enterprise — Let's talk. SOC 2 · AES-256 · data not used to train models.
note: Dani screenshotted a competitor pricing page to drop into the competitive doc.

title: Sam's hero layout v3
ocrText: LAUNCH HERO v3. [headline placeholder] — one line. Subhead: capture across every app, then act. CTA: Get Highlight free. Note from Sam: needs the final one-liner before I can finalize spacing.
note: Captured a design frame to reference while drafting the one-liner.

title: Activation benchmark chart
ocrText: Median D1 activation for AI productivity tools: 38%. Top quartile: 61%. Time-to-first-value correlates strongly with week-1 retention. Source: industry benchmark report 2025.
note: Benchmark Dani grabbed while researching launch metrics.

title: Final one-liner in context
ocrText: HERO COPY (final): Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward. Meta title + OG description updated. Preview deploy ready for Sam.
note: Captured the finalized copy to share in the launch channel.
